config.notes: Zod schemas + types + loadConfig/saveConfig. Python ref: config.py (358 lines). No dependencies except Zod.

operations.notes: Pure functions over config. Python ref: operations.py (979 lines). Depends on: config, clients (types only).

clients.notes: 18 client definitions, detection, format adapters, TOML writer. Python ref: clients.py (557 lines). Depends on: config.

sync.notes: Resolve + write engine, drift detection, symlink fan-out. Python ref: sync.py (636 lines). Depends on: config, clients, operations.

skills.notes: SKILL.md frontmatter parsing, canonical store CRUD. Python ref: skills.py (173 lines). Depends on: config.

search.notes: BM25-style local search over servers + skills. Python ref: search.py (211 lines). Depends on: config.

registry.notes: Registry adapter framework, Official + Glama backends, quality signals, caching. Python ref: registry.py (680 lines). Depends on: config.

doctor.notes: Deterministic health audit, structured scoring, 5 categories. Python ref: doctor.py (470 lines). Depends on: config, clients, sync.

projects.notes: Project registry reader via better-sqlite3. Python ref: projects.py (142 lines). Depends on: config.

cli.notes: Commander.js CLI wrapping operations. Python ref: cli.py (1674 lines). Depends on: ALL other modules.

init.notes: Guided onboarding flow. Complex interactive UX with multi-step wizard. Spec is detailed but implementation will need careful design for the non-interactive --auto path vs interactive flow.

migration.notes: mcpoyle -> Ensemble migration. Spec describes behavior but no Python reference exists for this (it is new to v1.0.0). Needs design for: config copy, skills store move, symlink update, marker replacement.

profile-as-plugin.notes: groups export --as-plugin. Spec describes the concept but implementation details for generating CC plugin packages are thin. Complex feature with unclear CC plugin manifest format requirements.

state-owner.briefingDigest: Greenfield TS build. 0/51 scenarios satisfied. 13 spec sections identified. 10 ready-to-build, 3 draft. Python reference impl is 6,435 lines across 12 modules. Recommended build order: config -> clients -> operations -> skills -> search -> registry -> sync -> doctor -> projects -> cli.
